<!-- Arrows -->
\newcommand{\proto}{\mathrel{\mkern3mu\vcenter{\hbox{$\shortmid$}}\mkern-10mu{\to}}}

<!-- Categories in the small -->
\newcommand{\dbl}[1]{\mathbb{#1}}
\newcommand{\cat}[1]{\mathcal{#1}}

<!-- Categories in the large -->
\newcommand{\Cat}[1]{\mathsf{#1}}

<!-- Double categories -->
\newcommand{\SSet}{\dbl{S}\Cat{et}}
\newcommand{\CCat}{\dbl{C}\Cat{at}}
\newcommand{\Mod}{\dbl{M}\Cat{od}}
\newcommand{\Rel}{\dbl{R}\Cat{el}}
